"[22] [Notification] [CHP]-PER FIRE COM, ENG RESPONDED TO RIVER TO THE EAST AT SANCHEZ / DOES NOT SEE FLAMES OR SMOKE / SEVERAL CONTROLLED BURNS IN AREA / ITS POSS THAT IS WHAT CHP HAD VIS OF / POSS VIOLINI RANCH CONTROLLED BURN IS WHAT IS SEEN / FIRE CLEARED"
